best_trajectory.observation:
Based on the visual evidence, the man shaking hands with Mark Rutte (who is on the far right) is **Alexander De Croo**, the Prime Minister of Belgium.

They are standing in front of the BeNeLux headquarters in Berlin, participating in the "Ukraine Defence Contact Group" meetings, as indicated by the signs. Standing next to Alexander De Croo (and to the left of Donald Tusk) is Jean Asselborn (Prime Minister of Luxembourg).
